sentiment.reasoning: A regulatory review of core infrastructure practices suggests potential operational disruptions, fines, or mandated changes, leading to negative financial implications.

headlines.headline: Urvel Grid secures $500M contract with a multinational manufacturer

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
